## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `pnpm audit` and no new vulnerabilities are introduced
- [ ] If adding a new dependency: justified in PR description
- [ ] If adding a new dependency: verified package provenance on npmjs.com
- [ ] Lockfile changes are committed (`pnpm-lock.yaml`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`pnpm run build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
